ai_summary: **Executive Summary**  Bhageria Industries Limited announced its 37th Annual General Meeting will be held virtually on August 1, 2026, to consider a recommended dividend of Rs. 2.50 per equity share for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Shareholders on record as of July 24, 2026, will be eligible for this proposed dividend, with payment expected from August 6, 2026, if approved. This standard corporate disclosure represents a positive return of capital to eligible shareholders, with no apparent red flags identified.
